debug_info.goal:
case h
f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ
F : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
ℓ : ℕ → ℝ
hfint : ∀ (n : ℕ), HasIntegral (f n) a b (ℓ n)
hfF : UnifConv f F
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
N n : ℕ
hn : n ≥ N
M : ℕ
hN : ∀ (x : ℝ), |f n x - F x| < ε / (b - a)
⊢ |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε

failed_attempts:
have h1 : |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| ≤ (ε / (b - a)) * (b - a) := by
    apply RiemannSum_diff_bound hab
    intro x
    exact le_of_lt (hN x)
  calc |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| 
      ≤ (ε / (b - a)) * (b - a) := h1
    _ = ε := by field_simp

rw [RiemannSum_sub]
  apply RiemannSum_bound_strict M hab hN

calc |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| 
      ≤ (ε / (b - a)) * (b - a) := RiemannSum_diff_le hab hN M
    _ = ε := by field_simp

calc |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| 
      ≤ (ε / (b - a)) * (b - a) := RiemannSum_diff_bound hab hN M
    _ = ε := by field_simp

have h := RiemannSum_diff_bound (f n) F a b M (ε / (b - a)) (by bound) (fun x => le_of_lt (hN x))
  calc |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| 
      ≤ (ε / (b - a)) * (b - a) := h
    _ = ε := by field_simp

calc |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M|
      ≤ (ε / (b - a)) * (b - a) := RiemannSum_diff_bound hab hN M
    _ = ε := by field_simp

rw [RiemannSum_sub]
  calc |RiemannSum (fun x => f n x - F x) a b M| 
      ≤ (ε / (b - a)) * (b - a) := RiemannSum_bound hab M (fun x => (hN x).le)
    _ = ε := by field_simp

calc |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| 
      ≤ (ε / (b - a)) * (b - a) := RiemannSum_diff_bound hab hN M
    _ = ε := by field_simp

have h1 : RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M = RiemannSum (fun x => f n x - F x) a b M := by
    simp [RiemannSum, Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
  rw [h1]
  have h2 : |RiemannSum (fun x => f n x - F x) a b M| ≤ (ε / (b - a)) * (b - a) := by
    apply RiemannSum_bound
    · linarith
    · intro x _
      exact le_of_lt (hN x)
  calc |RiemannSum (fun x => f n x - F x) a b M| ≤ (ε / (b - a)) * (b - a) := h2
    _ = ε := by field_simp

have h := RiemannSum_diff_bound (f n) F a b M hab (ε / (b - a)) (by bound) hN
  calc |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| 
      ≤ ε / (b - a) * (b - a) := h
    _ = ε := by field_simp
linarith

calc |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M|

    _ ≤ (ε / (b - a)) * (b - a) := RiemannSum_bound hab (fun x => le_of_lt (hN x))
    _ = ε := by field_simp

calc |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| 
      = |RiemannSum (fun x => f n x - F x) a b M| := by rw [RiemannSum_sub]
    _ ≤ (ε / (b - a)) * (b - a) := RiemannSum_abs_bound hab (fun x _ => le_of_lt (hN x))
    _ < ε := by bound

have h1 : RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M = RiemannSum (fun x => f n x - F x) a b M := by
    simp [RiemannSum, Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
  rw [h1]
  have h2 : |RiemannSum (fun x => f n x - F x) a b M| ≤ (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) := by
